entities.name: GENOMICS RESEARCH
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism

entities.name: CROP SCIENCE
entities.description: The science of crop production and improvement

entities.name: REFERENCE GENOME SEQUENCES
entities.description: High-quality genome sequences used as a standard for comparison

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Cultivated plants used for food, fiber, or other purposes

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMIC STUDIES
entities.description: Research aimed at understanding the relationship between the genome and the phenotype

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Basic physical and functional units of heredity

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of crops that are economically important for agriculture

entities.name: REGULATORY MECHANISMS
entities.description: Processes that control the expression of genes

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL PROCESSES
entities.description: The series of events that occur within a living organism to maintain life

entities.name: LARGE-SCALE RESEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing multiple genomes of the same species to identify variations

entities.name: GERMPLASMS
entities.description: The genetic material of a species, often stored in seed banks

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES (GWAS)
entities.description: Studies used to associate genetic variants with traits

entities.name: GENOME DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: GENETIC ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The number, effect size, and genomic location of genes contributing to a trait

entities.name: PHENOTYPE
entities.description: The observable physical or biochemical characteristics of an organism

entities.name: DNA SEQUENCE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Variations in the DNA sequence among individuals

entities.name: BREEDING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Systems and techniques used to improve the genetic makeup of crops

entities.name: GENOMIC BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding strategies that utilize genomic information to select for desired traits

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding technique that uses markers across the entire genome to predict trait values

entities.name: VARIETAL DESIGNS
entities.description: The planning and implementation of new crop varieties
